name: topolo-feed-api
description: Topolo Feed API - Media feed service for digital signage

scripts.deploy:
node -e 'console.error("
✘ Bare "deploy" is disabled to prevent agents from accidentally deploying to the wrong Cloudflare account.

  Use one of:
    npm run deploy:staging      # topolo-staging account (4f4e1c69a3830946f9fea7b1eb7531ac)
    npm run deploy:production   # production account  (49ef1ba682ad8cfd720c86699ae17521)

  See the staging consistency matrix in TopoloDocs for context.
"); process.exit(1)'
